integrationsHero.title: Connect with the Tools You Love
integrationsHero.subtitle: Arkadia Labs integrates with over 500 applications to supercharge your existing workflows.

salesforce.name: Salesforce
salesforce.description: Sync your leads and sales activities directly with the market-leading CRM.

hubspot.name: HubSpot
hubspot.description: Automate contact creation and log interactions in your HubSpot CRM.

zoom.name: Zoom
zoom.description: Real-time transcription and analysis of your Zoom meetings.

google_meet.name: Google Meet
google_meet.description: Integrate our AI agent into your Google Meets to automate note-taking.

ms_teams.name: Microsoft Teams
ms_teams.description: Enhance collaboration with intelligent responses in your channels and calls.

slack.name: Slack
slack.description: Receive notifications and execute actions from your AI agents directly in Slack.

howItWorks.title: Your Tools, Our Intelligence. Effortless Automation.
howItWorks.p1: Forget the technical complexity. We design and configure the intelligent workflows your AI agents need to operate.
howItWorks.p2: Thanks to our native integrations with market-leading tools, our agents handle everything: from updating your CRM to managing support tasks, all autonomously and efficiently. You just connect them and watch them work.

integrations.title: Your Tools, Without Limits.
integrations.subtitle: Our agents speak the language of all your apps. Connect your favorite tools and automate your workflows.

openai.name: OpenAI
openai.description: Access the most powerful AI models like GPT-4.

google_ai_studio.name: Google AI Studio (Gemini)
google_ai_studio.description: Create with the cutting-edge models of the Gemini family.

hugging_face.name: Hugging Face
hugging_face.description: Run thousands of models from the Hugging Face community.

claude.name: Claude
claude.description: A suite of AI models for diverse applications.

deepl.name: DeepL
deepl.description: Translate text with high precision and nuance.

slack.name: Slack
slack.description: Automate messages and notifications in your channels.

hubspot.name: HubSpot
